steps.title: Group the four terms in pairs
Factor each pair
steps.content: From the first pair, factor $x$: $x(4x-7)$. From the second pair, factor $3$: $\left(3\right)(4x-7)$. The shared factor is $4x-7$, giving $(4x-7)(x+3)$.

steps.title: Match against each choice
steps.content:
Compare the factors $(4x-7)$ and $(x+3)$ to the options:
  • $x-3$: sign is wrong; the linear factor is $x+3$.
  • $x+7$: not a factor.
  • $4x-7$: appears in the factorization.
  • $4x+3$: not a factor.
That matches the correct answer -- C is correct.
